title: [codex] remove stale portkey api key contract
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Keyless entry
gist.blurb: We swept up some stale Portkey API key configurations in the text service. Everything now neatly uses provider-specific credentials, keeping the codebase tidy and type-safe.
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated top-level Portkey API key contract from the text service in favor of existing provider-specific credentials.
gist.impact: Internal code and documentation are now more accurate, and type-checking passes cleanly without relying on stale environment variables.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up old rusty keys. The Nomnom creature eating the old keys. A glowing retro terminal in the background.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up old rusty keys into a dustpan while the round Nomnom creature happily eats one. A retro terminal in the background shows clean code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
